sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιβάλλω

- Transliteration: Periballo

- Phonetic: per-ee-bal'-lo

- Definition:

1. to throw around, to put around

a. to surround a city with a bank (palisade)

b. of garments, to clothe one

1. to put a thing on one

2. to clothe one with a thing

c. to put on or clothe one's self

- Origin: from G4012 and G906

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G906; to throw all around that is invest (with a palisade or with clothing): - array cast about clothe (-d me) put on.
